implementation_scope: Implement gated project overview and question/type shell pages
allowed_runtime_changes: page layout; workflow navigation; status chips; draft research question fields; active Meta type selection shell; Network Meta planned disabled callout
forbidden_runtime_changes: executor integration; Network Meta activation; final protocol confirmation; search execution; report/export
required_tests: IA stability; 10 main-flow + Meta Settings; Network Meta inactive; question/type draft-only; no result/report/export
exit_criteria: Project Home and Question/Type render with Developer Preview/testing boundaries and no executable analysis actions
notes: First runtime implementation stage should establish route/page state without touching backend executor logic.

implementation_scope: Implement gated search draft and reference/dedup preview shells
allowed_runtime_changes: English query draft UI; term groups; database draft selection; reference table preview; duplicate risk panel; adapter-needed import actions
forbidden_runtime_changes: Chinese DB direct retrieval; PubMed/Embase/WOS execution; real import; auto dedup merge/delete; auto screening handoff; PRISMA updates
required_tests: no Chinese DB direct retrieval; database selections draft-only; import/dedup actions disabled/gated; no files written
exit_criteria: Search and reference/dedup pages render as draft-only/gated surfaces
notes: Dedup can be a panel under reference management or a separate step, but it must not mutate records.

implementation_scope: Implement gated manual-review shells for screening, extraction, and risk-of-bias preview
allowed_runtime_changes: reference queue; draft screening decisions; advisory AI panel; full-text library shell; type-specific extraction form; draft RoB domain table
forbidden_runtime_changes: AI final decisions; final included studies; Chinese PDF extraction; automatic extraction; automatic RoB judgement; final quality score; analysis input promotion
required_tests: AI suggestion only; draft decision wording; no Chinese PDF extraction; no final extraction/ROB; no analysis-ready dataset
exit_criteria: Screening/extraction/RoB pages render with draft/manual-review boundaries and disabled final actions
notes: Use Save Draft Decision and Mark as Draft Extracted wording.

target_pages: Result Review; Report-ready Gate; Report Export
implementation_scope: Implement gated result/report/export pages and shared RRE shell adoption
allowed_runtime_changes: result readiness summary; empty forest/table boundary; report-ready blocker checklist; disabled export format controls
forbidden_runtime_changes: fake forest plot; fake pooled effect; heterogeneity/publication bias values; mark report-ready; generate report; DOCX/HTML/PDF/CSV/XLSX/ZIP export
required_tests: result_semantic testing_summary_only/no_formal_result; report_status draft/blocked; export disabled; no file write
exit_criteria: Result/report/export shell renders with all actions disabled and no fake outputs
notes: This stage may split Result Review and Report Export as separate pages if runtime IA needs it.

forbidden_runtime_changes: runtime UI changes; tests changes unless audit-only test is explicitly needed; executor/report/export enablement
required_tests: all focused UI tests; source smoke; diff checks
exit_criteria: Closure report confirms gates remain intact and forbidden capabilities remain off
notes: Do this before any executor carry-over or formal result work.
